name: Volcano Hybrid Filling Chamber Housing
summary: The Volcano Hybrid Filling Chamber Housing is designed for use with the Volcano Hybrid vaporiser.
description: The Volcano Hybrid Filling Chamber Housing is designed for use with the Volcano Hybrid vaporiser. This plastic housing does not contain any internal stainless steel components. To complete the setup, attach the tube flexer to the mouthpiece and tube. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
